name: Premium UI Remediation
description: Autonomous premium-Android UI pass driven by implementer evidence, planning, critique, and validation.

phases.name: Baseline
phases.prompt: Read the mockups, screenshots, and current Routify.Web UI. Report concrete visual deltas, tool availability, and the best first implementation slice.

phases.name: Plan
phases.prompt: Use implementer evidence and the mockups as source of truth. Define the current slice, acceptance criteria, and files/surfaces while keeping scope presentation-only.

phases.name: Critique Plan
phases.prompt: Critique the current slice against the mockups. If evidence is missing, say whether the implementer must produce it or whether the gap is externally blocked.

phases.name: Implement
phases.prompt: Implement the current slice in Routify.Web. You own validation and required proof artifacts. Report files, evidence, blockers, and whether another slice is required.

phases.name: Assess
phases.prompt: Assess only against shippable mockup fidelity. End with FINAL_STATUS: APPROVED if no material gaps; else FINAL_STATUS: CONTINUE or FINAL_STATUS: BLOCKED plus exact gaps and BLOCKER: ...
phases.interrupt_reason: blocked: external dependency or missing proof artifact

phases.name: Next Slice
phases.prompt: If Assess returned CONTINUE, define the next slice to close the exact gaps, list acceptance criteria/files, and hand off to implementer. Do not relaunch a BLOCKED loop.
